texto: Deep in the recesses of our mind is a trophy shelf on which sits many bottles. Each bottle contains the pain of a hurt that we have overcome and for which we have a scar - our badge of courage. Occasionally, a memory will knock the bottle off the shelf, the cork will come out and the pain is back. What we should notice each time this happens is that the pain is less intense, it takes less time to return it to the bottle and back onto the shelf and that our scar - our battle wound becomes stronger.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Susan Flusche sobre passagem do tempo e prioridades. A afirmação “Deep in the recesses of our mind is a trophy shelf on which sits many bottles. Each bottle contai…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a coragem, hurts, pain, útil em momentos de hurts e pain.
